ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Method size, LCOM1) */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., Size, Cohesion, Complexity) */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the metric (e.g., Size, Cohesion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "used_in" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of references where the metric is used */,
  "defined_in" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of references where the metric is defined */,
  "implemented" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the metric has been implemented */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  "metric_formula" TEXT /* Formula or algorithm used to calculate the metric */,
  "metric_thresholds" TEXT /* Acceptable thresholds for the metric */,
  "metric_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the metric on code quality */,
  "metric_source_code" TEXT /* Link to the source code where the metric is implemented */,
  "metric_last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository where the project is stored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "project_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer or manager of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "project_actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred by the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric usage event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the metric is used */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the metric was used */,
  "metric_usage_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric used */,
  "metric_usage_context" TEXT /* Context on where and how the metric was used */,
  "metric_usage_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the usage */,
  "metric_usage_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_usage_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_usage_metric_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_usage_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_definitions" (
  "definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric definition */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being defined */,
  "definition_source" TEXT /* Source where the metric is defined (e.g., research paper, standard) */,
  "definition_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was defined */,
  "definition_version" TEXT /* Version of the definition */,
  "definition_author" TEXT /* Author or source of the definition */,
  "definition_citation" TEXT /* Citation for the definition */,
  "definition_status" TEXT /* Status of the definition (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_implementation" (
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric implementation event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being implemented */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the metric is implemented */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was implemented */,
  "implementation_details" TEXT /* Details of the metric implementation */,
  "implementation_version" TEXT /* Version of the implementation */,
  "implementation_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the implementation */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of the implementation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "implementation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("implementation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_implementation_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_implementation_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_implementation_implementation_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("implementation_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or role within the team */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project or metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is generated for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., code quality, metric usage) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "report_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the report */,
  "report_share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been shared */,
  "report_view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
